info.name: Receptionist Override Capabilities API
info.description: Comprehensive collection for testing the new Receptionist Override Capabilities for appointment management. This collection includes all the new features like custom duration, backdating, and conflict override.

item.name: Custom Duration Appointments

body.raw:
{
  "date": "{{current_date}}",
  "startTime": "14:00",
  "doctorId": "{{test_doctor_id}}",
  "firstName": "Jan",
  "lastName": "Kowalski",
  "phone": "123456789",
  "email": "jan.kowalski@example.com",
  "consultationType": "offline",
  "customDuration": 8,
  "message": "Quick prescription renewal consultation",
  "metadata": {
    "visitType": "quick_check",
    "notes": "8-minute consultation for prescription renewal"
  }
}

request.description: Create a quick 8-minute consultation appointment. This demonstrates the custom duration capability for short consultations that don't fit standard time slots.

body.raw:
{
  "date": "{{current_date}}",
  "startTime": "09:00",
  "doctorId": "{{test_doctor_id}}",
  "firstName": "Anna",
  "lastName": "Nowak",
  "phone": "987654321",
  "email": "anna.nowak@example.com",
  "consultationType": "offline",
  "customDuration": 120,
  "message": "Extended consultation for complex case",
  "metadata": {
    "visitType": "extended_consultation",
    "needsAttention": true,
    "notes": "Complex case requiring extended consultation time"
  }
}

request.description: Create an extended 2-hour consultation appointment. This demonstrates the ability to book longer consultations for complex cases.
Test validation for invalid duration (0 minutes). This should return a 400 error with appropriate validation message.

item.description: Test appointments with custom durations ranging from quick consultations to extended sessions.

item.name: Backdated Appointments

body.raw:
{
  "date": "{{yesterday_date}}",
  "startTime": "10:00",
  "doctorId": "{{test_doctor_id}}",
  "firstName": "Maria",
  "lastName": "Dąbrowska",
  "phone": "111222333",
  "email": "maria.dabrowska@example.com",
  "consultationType": "offline",
  "customDuration": 20,
  "isBackdated": true,
  "message": "Appointment logged retrospectively",
  "metadata": {
    "visitType": "followup",
    "notes": "Patient visited yesterday but appointment wasn't logged until today"
  }
}

request.description: Create a backdated appointment for yesterday. This demonstrates the ability to log appointments that happened on past dates for accurate record-keeping.

item.name: Past Date Without Override - Should Fail

request.description: Test creating a past date appointment without setting isBackdated to true. This should return a 400 error with appropriate message.

body.raw:
{
  "date": "{{week_ago_date}}",
  "startTime": "14:30",
  "doctorId": "{{test_doctor_id}}",
  "firstName": "Katarzyna",
  "lastName": "Zielińska",
  "phone": "777888999",
  "email": "katarzyna.zielinska@example.com",
  "consultationType": "offline",
  "customDuration": 45,
  "isBackdated": true,
  "message": "Emergency visit from last week",
  "metadata": {
    "visitType": "emergency",
    "notes": "Emergency visit that occurred last week but wasn't logged"
  }
}

request.description: Create a backdated appointment for a week ago. This demonstrates the ability to log appointments from further in the past.

item.description: Test the ability to create appointments for past dates with proper override flags.

item.name: Conflict Override

body.raw:
{
  "date": "{{current_date}}",
  "startTime": "16:00",
  "doctorId": "{{test_doctor_id}}",
  "firstName": "Andrzej",
  "lastName": "Wójcik",
  "phone": "123123123",
  "email": "andrzej.wojcik@example.com",
  "consultationType": "offline",
  "customDuration": 30,
  "overrideConflicts": true,
  "message": "Emergency appointment overriding existing slot",
  "metadata": {
    "visitType": "emergency",
    "isWalkin": true,
    "notes": "Emergency patient needs immediate attention"
  }
}

request.description: Create an appointment that overrides an existing time conflict. This demonstrates the ability to book overlapping appointments when necessary.

body.raw:
{
  "date": "{{current_date}}",
  "startTime": "17:00",
  "doctorId": "{{test_doctor_id}}",
  "firstName": "Ewa",
  "lastName": "Kaczmarek",
  "phone": "456456456",
  "email": "ewa.kaczmarek@example.com",
  "consultationType": "offline",
  "customDuration": 25,
  "overrideConflicts": true,
  "message": "Second patient for same time slot",
  "metadata": {
    "visitType": "consultation",
    "notes": "Doctor can handle multiple patients simultaneously"
  }
}

request.description: Create a second appointment for the same time slot. This demonstrates the ability to book multiple patients at the same time.

item.name: Time Conflict Without Override - Should Fail

request.description: Test creating an appointment with a time conflict without setting overrideConflicts to true. This should return a 409 error.

item.description: Test the ability to override time conflicts and book multiple patients at the same time.

item.name: Role-Based Access Tests

body.raw:
{
  "date": "{{current_date}}",
  "startTime": "18:00",
  "doctorId": "{{test_doctor_id}}",
  "firstName": "Zofia",
  "lastName": "Pawlak",
  "phone": "111111111",
  "email": "zofia.pawlak@example.com",
  "consultationType": "offline",
  "customDuration": 60,
  "overrideConflicts": true,
  "message": "Doctor creating appointment with override",
  "metadata": {
    "visitType": "consultation",
    "notes": "Doctor using override capabilities"
  }
}

request.description: Test that doctors can also use the override capabilities. This should succeed and show createdBy as 'doctor'.

body.raw:
{
  "date": "{{current_date}}",
  "startTime": "19:00",
  "doctorId": "{{test_doctor_id}}",
  "firstName": "Robert",
  "lastName": "Michalski",
  "phone": "222222222",
  "email": "robert.michalski@example.com",
  "consultationType": "offline",
  "customDuration": 90,
  "isBackdated": true,
  "overrideConflicts": true,
  "message": "Admin creating appointment with all overrides",
  "metadata": {
    "visitType": "admin_override",
    "notes": "Admin testing all override capabilities"
  }
}

request.description: Test that admins can use all override capabilities. This should succeed and show createdBy as 'admin'.

item.description: Test that different user roles can access the override capabilities appropriately.

item.name: Metadata and Advanced Features

body.raw:
{
  "date": "{{current_date}}",
  "startTime": "20:00",
  "doctorId": "{{test_doctor_id}}",
  "firstName": "Agnieszka",
  "lastName": "Nowicka",
  "phone": "333333333",
  "email": "agnieszka.nowicka@example.com",
  "consultationType": "offline",
  "customDuration": 45,
  "overrideConflicts": true,
  "message": "Emergency walk-in patient",
  "metadata": {
    "visitType": "emergency",
    "isWalkin": true,
    "needsAttention": true,
    "patientSource": "walk_in",
    "isInternational": false,
    "enableRepeats": false,
    "isNewPatient": true,
    "consultationFee": 150,
    "notes": "Emergency walk-in requiring immediate attention"
  }
}

request.description: Create an emergency walk-in appointment with comprehensive metadata. This demonstrates the full range of metadata fields available.

body.raw:
{
  "date": "{{current_date}}",
  "startTime": "21:00",
  "doctorId": "{{test_doctor_id}}",
  "firstName": "Michał",
  "lastName": "Zawadzki",
  "phone": "444444444",
  "email": "michal.zawadzki@example.com",
  "consultationType": "online",
  "customDuration": 75,
  "overrideConflicts": true,
  "message": "Extended online consultation",
  "metadata": {
    "visitType": "online_consultation",
    "isInternational": true,
    "notes": "International patient requiring extended online consultation"
  }
}

request.description: Create an extended online consultation with custom duration. This demonstrates the ability to book online appointments with custom durations.

item.description: Test advanced features and comprehensive metadata usage.

item.name: Verification and Validation

request.description: Retrieve the details of a created appointment to verify that all override fields and metadata were saved correctly.
List appointments for a specific doctor and date to verify that appointments with overrides are properly displayed.

item.description: Verify that created appointments with overrides are properly saved and can be retrieved.

variable.description: Base URL of your API server
JWT token for a receptionist user
JWT token for a doctor user
JWT token for an admin user
ID of a test doctor for testing
ID of an appointment created in a previous request (for verification)
